ac_charging_allowed.reason: AC charging is currently disabled by Charge Source Priority.

utility_charging_allowed.reason: Utility charging is currently disabled by Charge Source Priority.

pv_only_charging.reason: Charge Source Priority is not currently set to PV Only.

off_grid_mode.reason: This recommendation is intended for Off-Grid operation.

pv_available.reason: PV input is not currently available.

capabilities.change_summary: Changes the inverter output topology mode reported by the SMG configuration block.
capabilities.note: Output mode according to SMG config block.

capabilities.change_summary: Changes how the inverter prioritizes utility, PV, and battery when powering the load.
capabilities.note: Output source priority according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Utility-PV-Battery
choices.description: Prefer utility first, then PV, then battery.

choices.label: PV-Utility-Battery
choices.description: Prefer PV first, then utility, then battery.

choices.label: PV-Battery-Utility
choices.description: Prefer PV first, then battery, then utility.

recommendations.reason: Typical self-consumption preference for off-grid operation.

capabilities.title: Input Voltage Range
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the acceptable AC input voltage range used by the inverter.
capabilities.note: Input voltage range according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Wide Range
choices.description: Allow a wider AC input voltage tolerance.

choices.label: Narrow Range
choices.description: Restrict AC input to a narrower utility range.

capabilities.note: Buzzer mode according to SMG config block.
LCD backlight behavior according to SMG config block.
LCD auto-return behavior according to SMG config block.
Power saving flag according to SMG config block.
Overload restart flag according to SMG config block.
Over-temperature restart flag according to SMG config block.
Overload bypass flag according to SMG config block.
Battery equalization enable flag according to SMG config block.
Turn-on mode according to the extended SMG config register set.

capabilities.change_summary: Requests remote turn-on through the extended SMG remote control register.
capabilities.note: Write register 420 with value 1 to request remote turn-on.

capabilities.change_summary: Requests remote shutdown through the extended SMG remote control register.
capabilities.note: Write register 420 with value 0 to request remote shutdown.
Charge source priority according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Utility Priority
choices.description: Prefer utility charging over PV charging.

choices.label: PV Priority
choices.description: Prefer PV charging when solar power is available.

choices.label: PV and Utility
choices.description: Allow both PV and utility charging.

recommendations.reason: Recommended when solar is available and AC charging should stay disabled.

capabilities.change_summary: Sends the inverter command that exits the fault state when supported by the current fault condition.
capabilities.note: Write register 426 with value 1 to request exit from fault mode.

presets.title: Off-Grid Self Consumption
presets.description: Prefer PV for the load, keep battery ahead of utility, and disable AC charging when solar power is available.

items.reason: Prefer PV first and battery second when powering the load.
Keep AC charging disabled and use PV only for charging.

presets.title: Hybrid PV With Grid Backup
presets.description: Prefer PV for both output and charging, while keeping utility ahead of battery as the backup source for the load.

items.reason: Use PV first, then utility, and keep battery as the last backup source.
Prefer PV charging while still allowing the system to use utility as needed.
